brand_name: XPDC Group (PT Xentra Platform Digital Cargo)

contact_info.address: Commercial Park ACP2 No. UG 16, RT.002/RW.007, Neglasari, Kec. Neglasari, Kota Tangerang, Banten 15129

layout.container: w-full max-w-[1440px] mx-auto px-6 md:px-12 lg:px-24
layout.grid_pattern: Bento Grid (Mode A: Tetris) for Services, Swiss Grid for About

motion_and_3d.preloader: Cinematic counter 0-100% using JetBrains Mono, placed dead center. Text color #FF4D00. Screen splits horizontally or fades elegantly to reveal the 3D scene (Sougen.co style).
motion_and_3d.three_js_scene: A global fixed <Canvas> using React Three Fiber. Use <Environment preset='dawn' />. The scene acts as a dynamic background behind HTML content.
motion_and_3d.cargo_ship_3d: Low-poly but premium shaded Cargo Ship model. Floats with subtle sine wave movement. Y-axis rotation tied to scroll progress. Visible during Hero and LCL/FCL sections.
motion_and_3d.cargo_plane_3d: Low-poly Cargo Plane. Moves horizontally across the background when the Air Freight section comes into view.
motion_and_3d.ui_animations: Framer Motion for text reveals (staggered letters/words), parallax image containers, and bento grid item entrances.

sections.layout: 100vh flex flex-col justify-center items-start relative z-10
sections.content: Massive typography: 'GLOBAL FREIGHT. BEYOND BORDERS.' Subtitle describing Air, LCL, FCL. Primary CTA: 'Track Shipment' or 'Explore Services'.
sections.visuals: 3D Cargo Ship dominates the background canvas.
sections.styles: Heading text-5xl md:text-6xl+ uppercase tracking-tighter. Mixed font weights (Light & Black).

sections.layout: Grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8 py-32 relative z-10
sections.content: About XPDC Group (PT Xentra Platform Digital Cargo). Text-focused storytelling.
sections.visuals: Deep typographic contrast. Large numbers tracking years of experience or volume.
sections.styles: Col-span-full md:col-span-8 for main text. Glassmorphic data cards on the side.

sections.content: Cards for Air Freight, FCL, and LCL. Each card MUST have a 'Get Inquiry' button that opens a quote modal.
sections.visuals: Hover states on cards trigger lighting changes. 3D Plane enters background when Air Freight is hovered or in view.
sections.styles: Borders 1px solid border/40. Backdrop blur if overlapping 3D. Generous p-8 or p-12 inside cards.
Monochrome technical look with primary color accents.

sections.visuals: A vertical line that 'fills' with the primary color as the user scrolls down (Framer Motion useScroll).
sections.styles: Heavy use of negative space on the right side.

sections.visuals: React-fast-marquee with low contrast, glassmorphic cards.

sections.content: Input field for AWB/Tracking number. Mock functionality.
sections.visuals: Floating label input, high contrast button.
sections.styles: Input field should have a subtle inner glow on focus.

sections.layout: Massive padding py-32. Grid cols-1 md:grid-cols-2.
sections.content: Address, Email, Social links. Multi-language toggle (ID/EN) placed here or in header.
sections.visuals: Massive 'LET\'S TALK' text filling the width.

header.elements: Logo (XPDC), Nav links, Theme Toggle, Language Switcher (ID/EN), 'Get Quote' CTA.

inquiry_modal.behavior: Opens when 'Get Inquiry' is clicked. Contains a Form (Name, Email, Cargo Details, Weight/Volume).
inquiry_modal.submit_state: Must show a loading spinner/state during submission. On success, close modal and show Sonner Toast. On error, show error Toast.

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALLATION: You must install 'lenis' (for smooth scroll), 'framer-motion', 'three', '@react-three/fiber', '@react-three/drei', 'lucide-react', 'sonner', and Shadcn UI components (dialog, form, input, select, button).

3D IMPLEMENTATION: Build a continuous <Canvas> in the background. Use <Suspense> and Drei's <useGLTF> for the ship/plane. If you do not have external GLTF models, build highly stylized geometric placeholders (e.g., elongated blocks for ships) using standard meshes, but make them look premium with <MeshStandardMaterial> and lighting.
SCROLL BINDING: Use Framer Motion's useScroll() to extract scrollYProgress, and tie it to the rotation and position of the 3D objects in the canvas.
FORM & TOASTS: Use 'sonner' for toast notifications. The Inquiry Form must mock an async API call (setTimeout for 2 seconds) to demonstrate the loading state, then trigger a success toast.

STYLING: Strictly enforce the 'Clash Display' and 'Satoshi' fonts. Add them via Google Fonts or next/font (if Next.js, but this is pure React/Vite so use Google Fonts CDN in index.html). Do NOT use Inter. Enforce the #FF4D00 primary color. Ensure dark mode and light mode are fully implemented using Tailwind's 'dark:' variant class.
TEST IDS: You MUST include the exact data-testids specified in this JSON for testing purposes.
